hook.name: VolumeDynamicFeeHook
hook.description: A single-pool Uniswap v4 hook that dynamically adjusts LP fees across three regimes (floor, cash, extreme) based on EMA-smoothed per-period volume analysis. After each swap, it accrues a configurable percentage of LP fees to the hook owner and may update the pool's dynamic fee tier via poolManager.updateDynamicLPFee().
